title: KENT Grand RO Water Purifier (RO+UF+TDS Control + UV LED, 8L, 20LPH)
short_description: Reliable 8L RO water purifier from KENT with multi-stage purification and TDS control for safe drinking water.
long_description:
The KENT Grand RO Water Purifier is one of the most popular and trusted water purifiers in India, designed to deliver safe and clean drinking water using advanced multi-stage purification technology. It combines RO, UF, UV LED, and TDS control to remove dissolved impurities, bacteria, viruses, and harmful chemicals.

The advanced RO membrane effectively eliminates contaminants like arsenic, lead, mercury, and pesticides, making it suitable for borewell, tanker, and municipal water sources. The UV LED in the storage tank ensures water remains pure for longer durations.

The built-in TDS controller allows retention of essential natural minerals, improving both taste and health benefits. With a purification capacity of 20 litres per hour and an 8L storage tank, it is suitable for medium-sized families.

KENT also provides a wide service network and free installation, making it a reliable choice for long-term usage.

specifications.technology: RO + UF + UV LED + TDS Control

pros: Trusted brand with large service network
cons: Basic design compared to newer models
